user.title: Lepro Pixel LED
user.description: Sign in with your Lepro app account.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Lepro. Check your network and region.

abort.already_configured: This Lepro account is already set up.

init.title: Pixel count overrides
init.description: Optional: Force a pixel count for specific devices if auto-detect fails. Format: did:count, did:count (e.g. 1234567890:15). Leave blank to trust the dynamic auto-detector.
